news.text: Stellantis-backed Leapmotor delivers more than 100,000 EVs for fourth-straight quarter as BYD sales fall
Russia says it's ready to help resolve Iran conflict - Reuters
Wall St futures slide as Trump signals more Iran strikes - Reuters
Iran to allow safe passage of Philippine ships, fuel supply through Strait of Hormuz, says Manila - Reuters
Iran army chief tells commanders to prepare for any attack, state media reports - Reuters
From international outcast to mediator in Iran war, Pakistan's remarkable makeover - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Markets are grinding higher in pre-market despite escalating Iran tensions, with SPY up 0.75% to $655.24 and QQQ leading at +1.24%. VIX down 2.72% to 34.73 suggests risk appetite returning, but energy's -3.74% plunge shows crude supply concerns persist.

◆ What to Watch

  • Iran War Headlines - Trump signaling more strikes while Russia offers mediation. Any escalation will crater risk assets fast
  • Energy Sector Breakdown - XLE down nearly 4% as oil prices whipsaw on Strait of Hormuz tensions
  • LNN Earnings (BMO) - EPS estimate of $1.70, one of the few meaningful reports today
  • Tech Leadership Test - XLK up 1.51% carrying the market, but needs follow-through after opening

◆ Sector Rotation

Classic risk-on rotation with Tech (+1.51%) and Industrials (+1.67%) leading while Energy (-3.74%) gets hammered on supply disruption fears. Materials (+0.98%) holding up suggests inflation hedging demand, while Utilities (+0.48%) lagging indicates genuine risk appetite not just defensive flows.
⚡ Key Driver
Iran war escalation risk vs. market's resilience. Every headline will move futures 1-2% in either direction today.
⚠ Bear Case
VIX at 34.73 is still elevated. One bad Iran headline and this pre-market bounce evaporates instantly. Energy sector breakdown could spread to broader market.
✦ Bull Case
Market climbing walls of worry with actual geopolitical crisis. If Iran tensions de-escalate even slightly, massive short covering rally likely in energy and broader indices.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY $655 - Pre-market high, break above targets $660 resistance
  • QQQ $580 - Key support level, holding above keeps tech rally intact
  • XLE $85 - Energy sector support, break below signals more pain
  • VIX $35 - Holding below keeps risk-on trade alive, spike above kills rally

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
